Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like the product I ordered through[n]the shopping program on TV has arrived.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked[n]me to get a variety of drinks for her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think I have everything now. I should[n]bring them to her before I forget...[n]{f 1 1}
